name: What if I have pre-existing distrust of AI in legal work?
description: Request no-AI in writing; shop firms.

mainEntity.name: What if I have pre-existing distrust of AI in legal work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Request no-AI in writing; shop firms.
acceptedAnswer.description: Request no-AI policy in engagement letter. Context: Clients can dictate terms; lawyers accommodate. Key factors: Informed consent, alternative workflows. Practical guidance: Specify in retainer, find AI-averse firms via referrals. Your right.
